text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Oh no... This restaurant is booked out, too...
What should I do about the party venue?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Father will be back in Japan soon, but I don't
have anything ready! At this rate... Ohhh...
Urgh... What should I dooo?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Urara? Is something the matter?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Rice! Oh, I know! Um, there's something I'd
like your help with!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I see. The fishmonger you're friends with has a
new grandchild on the way, and you want to buy
the baby a picture book as a gift.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Exactly! But there are so many to pick from! Can
you help me choose one?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: S-sure! I'd be glad to help!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Since it's going to be for a baby, I think
something easy to understand would be best!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, then how about a pop-up book? The baby
can have fun just looking at it!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Fairy tales would be good too. They have clear
themes and can still be enjoyed after the child
grows up.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Oooh! Nice! A fairy tale, huh? Great suggestion!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, the two Umamusume spend several hours
scouring a number of bookstores.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Yayyy! We found the perfect fairy tale pop-up
book!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Ack! When did it get so dark out?!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: I'm so sorry, Rice! I took up so much of your time!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Don't worry. It's fine. I had a lot of fun
today.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
And I like seeing you so happy, Urara. So there's
no need to feel guil—

text_block_list.name: Rice's Father
text_block_list.text:
...It's okay to rely on us, Rice. We'd be more than
happy to help you.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
(I wonder if the way I feel now is how Father and
Mother felt back then...)

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: (If that's the case, then...)

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Um, Urara? I've actually got a bit of a problem
myself.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I want to hold a party for my parents and show
them a good time!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: But... I can't get anything done on my own...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
And so, um, Urara... Could you please help me
out?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Wha?! You want me to help you?!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Of course I will! I want to put a big smile on your
face, too, Rice!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Oh, we should try asking others for help too!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
I know everyone will be more than happy to pitch
in for your sake, Rice!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Urara... Okay! Let's give it a try!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Thanks a lot, Fine! Let's go with that for the
venue!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Um, I'll have to order catering from the restaurant
Curren recommended too. And after that... After
that is...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Oh, umm... I'm looking for a place where we can
rehearse for the party...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I want this to be an absolute success, so I need to
make sure the preparations are perfect!
choice_data_list: I'm sure it's going to be a great party.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I want this to be an absolute success, so I need to
make sure the preparations are perfect!
choice_data_list: I'm sure it's going to be a great party.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I think so too! Especially since everyone is
working so hard for my sake!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Thanks for hearing me out. I'm going to keep
searching for a suitable place!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: A-are you sure?
choice_data_list: Of course! I'm more than happy to help!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Th-thank you! I really appreciate it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I go around the academy with Rice Shower, and
we manage to borrow the cafeteria for her
rehearsal. I really hope her plan is a big success.
